title: Petco (WOOF) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Petco (WOOF) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript. Management Remarks: CEO Joel Anderson provided opening commentary on the company's 2025 turnaround achievement, emphasizing margin expansion, cash flow improvement, and balance sheet repair. The Reach for the Sky strategy was outlined for 2026 growth phase. Financial Results: Full year 2025 adjusted EBITDA up 21.3% to $408.2 million. Net income swung to $9.1 million profit from $101.8 million loss in 2024. Free cash flow surged 276% to $187 million. Key Initiatives for 2026: Fresh food expansion with 1,000+ new freezers in stores. Introduction of 25+ new brands and flavors in merchandise assortment. Expansion of companion animal offerings. Strategic Store Network: Net closures of 15-20 underperforming locations expected in 2026. Veterinary Services: 300 full-service hospitals and 1,600 Vetco clinics in operation. Strong doctor retention and expanded hiring. Services seen as key growth pillar with higher margins. Analyst Q&A: Analysts questioned near-term sales trajectory, seasonal patterns, and margin sustainability. Management reiterated confidence in 2026 guidance based on transformation work completed in 2025.
